summary: Full site test of Mira OS Pet Concierge. Backend APIs: 15/16 passed (94%). Frontend: Login flow works, /mira-demo page loads successfully, chat with Mira works, quick reply chips clickable, pet selector works. Sign Out button has click interception issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Click timeout - possible z-index or overlay issue preventing click on dashboard

issues: Page is 3,299 lines - previous reports noted browser crashes on some devices, but loaded successfully in this test

action_items: Fix Sign Out button click interception - may have overlay or z-index issue
Fix /api/auth/logout endpoint to accept proper logout requests (currently returns 422)
critical_code_review_comments: Login flow with dipali@clubconcierge.in / test12 works correctly
Mira chat API responds properly with personalized messages
Dashboard shows all 7 pets with Soul scores
Quick reply chips in /mira-demo are clickable and trigger Mira responses
Pet selector dropdown works and shows product recommendations

success_rate.frontend: 90% (all features work except Sign Out click)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Full site tested successfully. Login→Dashboard→Mira Demo flow works. Sign Out button visible but has click timeout. /mira-demo page (3,299 lines) loads without crashing now. Backend Mira chat API working well. Preview URL: https://mira-ticketing.preview.emergentagent.com
rca_of_the_issue: Sign Out button click timeout: The button is visible and found by selector, but clicking times out. This suggests either: 1) An invisible overlay blocking clicks, 2) CSS z-index issue, or 3) Event listener conflict. The button HTML exists in DOM but click events aren't reaching it properly.
